title: Literature review about the science-journalism relationship
author: de Jong, Anouk
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
* New version available * 

 This report describes the first literature review results to develop a robust base for a series of studies within the ENJOI project that explore the science-media relationship. The literature review focuses on the quality and effectiveness of interactions between scientists and media to identify challenges and changes in the science-media relationship. It addresses how collaborations between scientists and media producers can improve accuracy in science communication and how these interactions can be fostered and improved.
